sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48564" key="*qettalo/tmhton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Θεττᾰλότμητον</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κρέας</foreign> a lump of meat <sense id="n48564.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">such as you would cut for a hungry Thessalian</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0489.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philetaer.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
